forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Sleet and rain and areas of fog before midnight, then sleet and freezing rain and areas of fog between midnight and 3am, then snow and sleet and areas of fog. Cloudy, with a low around 33. Northeast wind around 14 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of around one inch possible.

forecast.name: Friday
forecast.detailedForecast: Snow and sleet and areas of fog before 9am, then rain showers and areas of fog and patchy drizzle between 9am and noon, then areas of fog and a chance of rain showers and patchy drizzle between noon and 3pm, then areas of fog and patchy drizzle and a slight chance of rain showers. Cloudy, with a high near 34. Northeast wind 9 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

weather_report:
As the night cloaks Boston in a blend of sleet and rain, an aura of mist seems to wrap the city, casting everything into a hazy embrace. A sense of chill lingers in the air, punctuated by gusts that dance through the streets, hinting at the warmth of an indoor haven. The temperature hovers close to freezing, urging one to layer up with thick fabrics, perhaps a wool coat snug against the skin, a knitted scarf wound protectively about the neck, and sturdy boots for sloshing about in the messy streets. 

Tomorrow promises a continuation of this wintry struggle, as the daylight brings not much relief. Fog will mingle with rain, turning the world into a watercolor painting gone awry, with drizzles painting forlorn streaks along the windowpanes. It might not be the day for outdoor adventures, but there is a beauty in the quietude, an invitation to seek solace in a favorite café, where the aroma of freshly brewed coffee dances with conversations and soft laughter. Perhaps a gentle stroll along the Charles or a leisurely visit to an art gallery will provide warmth to the spirit, as the grayness of the day encourages a reflective pause.
